## Before Writing Any Component

```
Step 1: Check Section 3 — does this component exist in @exxat-ds/ui?
Step 2: Check Section 4 — does this component exist in studentUX?
Step 3: If yes to either → IMPORT. Do not rebuild.
Step 4: If no to both → build as a product feature component.
Step 5: When you build it → add it to Section 6 "Already built".
```

---

## 1. Confirmed Import Paths

### Admin App (apps/exam-management/admin/)

**CSS — app/globals.css:**
```css
@import '../../../../exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/theme.css';
@import "tailwindcss";
@source '../../../../exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}';

/* DataTable tokens — define in globals.css, not theme.css */
:root {
  --dt-header-bg:       var(--background);
  --dt-row-bg:          var(--background);
  --dt-row-hover:       oklch(0.972 0.001 270);
  --dt-row-selected:    oklch(0.962 0.003 260);
  --dt-row-selected-fg: var(--foreground);
  --dt-group-bg:        oklch(0.972 0.001 270);
  --sticky-edge-fade:   oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08);
}
```

**Webpack alias (next.config.ts):**
```ts
'@exxat/ds'      → path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../exxat-ds')
'@exxat/student' → path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../studentUX/src')
```

**Admin DS components:**
```ts
import { Button, Sidebar, Badge, ... } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
```

**layout.tsx — fonts (confirmed from actual file):**
```tsx
import type { Metadata } from 'next'
import './globals.css'

export const metadata: Metadata = { title: 'Exam Management — Admin' }

export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <html lang="en" className="theme-one">
      <head>
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://use.typekit.net/wuk5wqn.css" />
        <script
          src="https://kit.fontawesome.com/d9bd5774e0.js"
          crossOrigin="anonymous"
          async
        />
      </head>
      <body className="antialiased">{children}</body>
    </html>
  )
}
```

### Student App (apps/exam-management/student/)

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import '../../../../studentUX/src/styles/globals.css';
@source '../../../../studentUX/src/components/**/*.{ts,tsx}';
```

```ts
import { Button } from '@exxat/student/components/ui/button'
import { DataTable, FilterBar, PrimaryPageTemplate } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
```

---

## 2. Apply the Theme

The Admin DS uses CSS class-based theming. There is no `applyTheme()` function.

```tsx
// In layout.tsx — add class to <html>:
<html lang="en" className="theme-one">         // Exxat One Lavender (default)
// or:
<html lang="en" className="theme-prism">       // Exxat Prism Rose

// For runtime switching, use useAppTheme() hook:
import { useAppTheme } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
const { brand, setBrand } = useAppTheme()
// setBrand("one")   → applies .theme-one class
// setBrand("prism") → applies .theme-prism class
```

**What brand tokens resolve to with `.theme-one` (Lavender):**
```
--brand-tint        = oklch(0.9676 0.016 286.1)   ← sidebar bg
--brand-color       = oklch(0.50 0.14 286.1)      ← interactive accent
--brand-color-dark  = oklch(0.38 0.11 286.1)      ← deep accent
--sidebar           = var(--brand-tint)            = oklch(0.9676 0.016 286.1)
```

```
avatar               — Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback

drag-handle-grip     — DragHandleGrip
drawer               — Drawer, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, DrawerFooter

field                — Field, FieldLabel, FieldDescription, FieldError
form                 — Form, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormMessage
input-group          — InputGroup, InputGroupAddon
input                — Input
kbd                  — Kbd, KbdGroup
label                — Label
popover              — Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger
radio-group          — RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem
select               — Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue
selection-tile-grid  — SelectionTileGrid, SelectionTile

sheet                — Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetFooter
sidebar              — Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarHeader, SidebarFooter, SidebarMenu,
                       SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarGroup, SidebarGroupContent,
                       SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarSeparator, useSidebar, SidebarProvider,
                       SidebarTrigger, SidebarInset
skeleton             — Skeleton
sonner               — Toaster (used for Sonner setup only — do not call toast() for product feedback)
table                — Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableCell, TableHead
tabs                 — Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent
textarea             — Textarea
tip                  — Tip (tooltip-style hint)
toggle-group         — ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem
toggle-switch        — ToggleSwitch
toggle               — Toggle
tooltip              — Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger, TooltipProvider
view-segmented-control — ViewSegmentedControl, ViewSegmentedItem
```

**Hooks:**
```
useAppTheme    — brand + contrast theme management
useCoachMark   — guided onboarding coach marks
useMobile      — mobile breakpoint detection
useModKeyLabel — OS-correct modifier key (⌘ vs Ctrl)
```

## 5. Token Quick Reference

Most-used tokens with `.theme-one` (Lavender) active:

```css
/* Surfaces */
--background        = oklch(1 0 0)             /* page canvas */
--card              = oklch(1 0 0)             /* card surfaces */
--sidebar           = oklch(0.9676 0.016 286.1) /* brand lavender tint */

/* Text */
--foreground        = oklch(0.145 0 0)         /* primary text 17:1 on white */
--muted-foreground  = oklch(0.50 0.012 270)    /* secondary text 5.5:1 */

/* Brand accent */
--brand-color       = oklch(0.50 0.14 286.1)   /* interactive lavender */
--brand-color-dark  = oklch(0.38 0.11 286.1)   /* hover/active state */
--brand-tint        = oklch(0.9676 0.016 286.1) /* surface wash */

/* Borders */
--border            = oklch(0.92 0.002 270)    /* decorative only */
--border-control-35 = oklch(0.25 0.01 270)     /* form fields (WCAG enhanced) */

/* Primary actions */
--primary           = oklch(0.3457 0.0052 286.13) /* button/CTA */
--primary-foreground = oklch(0.985 0 0)           /* text on primary */

/* Status */
--destructive       = oklch(0.55 0.22 25)      /* error/danger red */

/* Charts */
--chart-1  = oklch(0.55 0.22 264.116)  /* indigo */
--chart-2  = oklch(0.48 0.15 184.704)  /* teal */
--chart-3  = oklch(0.32 0.08 227.392)  /* slate */
--chart-4  = oklch(0.65 0.18 84.429)   /* amber */
--chart-5  = oklch(0.58 0.18 70.08)    /* orange */
```

## 7. Next.js App Router Requirements

### 'use client' Rule
```tsx
'use client'
// Required at top of any file that uses:
// — useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef, or any React hook
// — usePathname, useRouter, useSearchParams (Next.js navigation hooks)
// — Event handlers (onClick, onChange, onSubmit, etc.)
// — useAppTheme, useSidebar, useMobile, useModKeyLabel
// Server components (default) must NOT have 'use client'
```

### Portal Pattern (for menus and overlays — confirmed from components/qb/portal.tsx)
```tsx
'use client'
import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'

export function Portal({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false)
  useEffect(() => { setMounted(true) }, [])
  if (!mounted) return null
  return createPortal(children, document.body)
}
```

### layout.tsx — Full Working Version (admin)
```tsx
import type { Metadata } from 'next'
import './globals.css'

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: 'Exam Management — Admin',
}

export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <html lang="en" className="theme-one">
      <head>
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://use.typekit.net/wuk5wqn.css" />
        <script
          src="https://kit.fontawesome.com/d9bd5774e0.js"
          crossOrigin="anonymous"
          async
        />
      </head>
      <body className="antialiased">{children}</body>
    </html>
  )
}
```

## 8. Question Bank — Magic Patterns Migration

Design reference: https://www.magicpatterns.com/c/kq8sem88owbpxfzmopj8in/preview

**QB components ready to migrate:**
```
QBView              — top-level QB shell
QBViewTop           — toolbar / header area
QBViewBottom        — main content area
QBViewMain          — primary content region
QBFolderRows        — folder tree / sidebar navigation
QBQuestionRow       — single question row in list
QBFilterSheet       — filter drawer/sheet
QBModals            — all modal dialogs
QBFacultyModals     — faculty-specific modals
QBAssignModal       — assign question modal
QBData              — data layer / mock data types
QBStyles            — QB-specific CSS overrides
QBInlineHelpers     — inline utility components
Portal              — portal for overlays (see components/qb/portal.tsx)
QuestionBankFull    — full QB view composition
```

**QB patterns already established:**
- Folder tree uses `[role="treeitem"]` for accessibility
- Hover actions use CSS: `.qb-folder-menu-btn { opacity: 0 }` → show on `[role="treeitem"]:hover`
- Badges: defined in `components/qb/badges.tsx`

---

## 9. Self-Update Rule

When you build a new feature component in this product:
→ Add it to Section 6 "Already built" with its DS import mapping

When DS updates arrive (Himanshu runs `git submodule update --remote --merge`):
→ Re-read `exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/index.ts` and update Section 3
→ Re-read `studentUX/src/components/shared/index.ts` and update Section 4
→ Run `pnpm build` to catch any broken imports
